proven.claim: Proven: "analyze" appears in help (line 541) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 541
; Proven: "analyze" appears in help (line 541) AND is implemented as
; case "analyze": await runAnalyze(rest) in the switch.
(declare-const analyze_documented Int)
(declare-const analyze_implemented Int)
(assert (= analyze_documented 1))
(assert (= analyze_implemented 1))
(assert (not (= analyze_documented analyze_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — analyze is both documented and implemented
